description:
Half-Life Advanced Effects (HLAE) is a tool to enrich Source (mainly CS:GO) engine based movie making.


- Included AfxHookSource2 0.39.2 (2026-05-27T11:08Z)
AfxHookSource2 0.39.2 (2026-05-27T11:08Z)
- Updated mirv_noflash to accept float value from 0.0 to 1.0 to control amount of noflash effect.
